---
title: "Home"
---

![](img/profile.jpeg){width=200px}

# About me

I am a Lecturer at the [Faculty of Psychology](https://fpsi.uinjkt.ac.id/en/bachelor-of-psychology) at [Syarif Hidayatullah State Islamic University](https://uinjkt.ac.id/en) and a Doctoral Researcher at the [Department of Statistics](https://www.su.se/english/divisions/department-of-statistics) at [Stockholm University](https://www.su.se/english/)

## Research Interests

-   Item Response Theory

-   Confirmatory Factor Analysis

-   Educational Measurement

## Teaching

-   Factor Analysis

-   Linear Regression Analysis

-   Structural Equation Modeling

## Contact

e-mail: wara.alfa\@uinjkt.ac.id

e-mail: wara.alfa.syukrilla\@stat.su.se
